Active `.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml` was neutralized because GitHub Actions repeatedly rejected generated syntax.

Re-enable policy:
1. Keep active workflow disabled until template syntax is validated outside GitHub Actions parser failures.
2. Do not use schedule triggers.
3. Re-enable only by copying `governance/workflows_disabled/governance-validation-ci.template.yml` to `.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml` after validation.
4. First proof after re-enable must be GitHub Actions acceptance, not Release PASS.
5. Release PASS remains blocked until production Telegram, live runtime, and external Claude receipts validate.
